description_long: This is a rugged, military-style backpack constructed primarily from olive green fabric with brown leather straps and metal hardware. The front features three external pouches secured with flaps, and several metal carabiners are attached to the lower front for utility. A large cylindrical bedroll or mat is strapped horizontally across the top, and a metal canteen is attached to one side, while an axe with a wooden handle is secured on the opposite side. The back of the pack is reinforced with wide, padded leather shoulder straps and cross-supports for comfort and durability. The overall design suggests it is built for heavy-duty outdoor or survival use, with ample storage and attachment points for additional gear.
description: A military-style olive green backpack with brown leather straps, external pouches, a top bedroll, side canteen, and an attached axe.
description_view_0: Front view showing three external pouches, metal carabiners, brown leather straps, and the cylindrical bedroll on top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the attached metal canteen and the thickness of the bedroll.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide, padded leather shoulder straps and cross-supports, with the bedroll visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the secured axe with a wooden handle and the side pocket.
attribute_strap_design: Two wide, brown leather shoulder straps with cross-supports; adjustable with metal buckles; additional leather securing straps for bedroll and gear.
attribute_pocket_configuration: Three external front pouches with flap closures, one side pocket under the canteen, main compartment under the top flap.
